narrative:
Precinct Center South (precinct in Williams County) has 877 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.6 percentage points.
